requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——FCC第15部分（非有意辐射体）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——FCC第15部分（非有意輻射體）

summary.en: Air-source heat pumps with electronic controls, inverter drives, or digital communications modules are subject to FCC Part 15 (47 CFR Part 15) as unintentional radiators. Equipment must not exceed the radiated and conducted emission limits specified in FCC Part 15 Subpart B. Class B limits apply to devices marketed for residential use; Class A limits apply to commercial/industrial equipment. FCC authorisation may be obtained through either the Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) or FCC certification (for intentional radiators in the same product), following FCC-accredited laboratory testing. The FCC mark (or SDoC statement) must be displayed on the product or in documentation. Equipment marketed without FCC authorisation may be seized at US customs.
summary.zh: 配有电子控制器、变频驱动器或数字通信模块的空气源热泵，依据FCC第15部分（47 CFR第15部分）属于非有意辐射体，须符合规定要求。设备不得超过FCC第15部分B子部分规定的辐射和传导发射限值。B类限值适用于面向住宅用途销售的设备；A类限值适用于商业/工业设备。FCC授权可通过供应商合规声明（SDoC）或FCC认证（适用于同一产品中的有意辐射体）取得，须经FCC认可实验室测试。FCC标志（或SDoC声明）须显示在产品上或文件中。未获FCC授权而在市场销售的设备可能在美国海关被查扣。
summary.zht: 配有電子控制器、變頻驅動器或數字通信模塊的空氣源熱泵，依據FCC第15部分（47 CFR第15部分）屬於非有意輻射體，須符合規定要求。設備不得超過FCC第15部分B子部分規定的輻射和傳導發射限值。B類限值適用於面向住宅用途銷售的設備；A類限值適用於商業/工業設備。FCC授權可通過供應商合規聲明（SDoC）或FCC認證（適用於同一產品中的有意輻射體）取得，須經FCC認可實驗室測試。FCC標誌（或SDoC聲明）須顯示在產品上或文件中。未獲FCC授權而在市場銷售的設備可能在美國海關被查扣。

standards_or_laws: 47 CFR Part 15 Subpart B — Unintentional Radiators (FCC emissions limits for electronic devices)
FCC KDB Publication 996369 — FCC Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) process

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household electrical appliances (including heat pumps and air conditioners) are primarily GB/T 9254 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics) and GB 4343.1 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus). These standards are technically derived from CISPR 22 and CISPR 14-1 respectively and share similar emission limit structures with FCC Part 15, but differ in test conditions, frequency ranges, measurement distances, and limit values at specific frequencies. Chinese CNAS-accredited EMC test reports to GB/T 9254 or GB 4343 are not accepted as substitutes for FCC Part 15 compliance testing.
summary.zh: 中国家用电器（包括热泵和空调）的电磁兼容要求主要为GB/T 9254（信息技术设备——无线电骚扰特性）和GB 4343.1（家用电器、电动工具及类似器具的电磁骚扰特性限值）。这些标准分别源自CISPR 22和CISPR 14-1，与FCC第15部分共享类似的发射限值结构，但在测试条件、频率范围、测量距离和特定频率限值方面有所不同。由中国CNAS认可实验室出具的依据GB/T 9254或GB 4343的EMC测试报告，不被接受为FCC第15部分合规测试的替代。
summary.zht: 中國家用電器（包括熱泵和空調）的電磁相容要求主要為GB/T 9254（信息技術設備——無線電騷擾特性）和GB 4343.1（家用電器、電動工具及類似器具的電磁騷擾特性限值）。這些標準分別源自CISPR 22和CISPR 14-1，與FCC第15部分共享類似的發射限值結構，但在測試條件、頻率範圍、測量距離和特定頻率限值方面有所不同。由中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的依據GB/T 9254或GB 4343的EMC測試報告，不被接受為FCC第15部分合規測試的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics (SAC, derived from CISPR 22)
GB 4343.1 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (SAC, derived from CISPR 14-1)

gap.en: Chinese ASHP products with inverter drives or smart controls must be re-tested to FCC Part 15 Class B limits by an FCC-accredited laboratory (NVLAP or A2LA accredited). The product must then be authorised via SDoC (or FCC certification if the product includes intentional radiators such as Wi-Fi, Zigbee, or Z-Wave modules). Key practical gaps: (1) Chinese inverter heat pumps typically operate at 50 Hz and Chinese emission limits are calibrated to 50 Hz operating conditions — US products operate at 60 Hz, which changes harmonic emission profiles; (2) Wi-Fi or smart home modules require separate FCC certification as intentional radiators; (3) FCC label and SDoC statement must be in English on or with the product. Chinese EMC test reports are not accepted by FCC-accredited laboratories as equivalents.
gap.zh: 配有变频驱动器或智能控制系统的中国ASHP产品，须由FCC认可实验室（NVLAP或A2LA认可）按FCC第15部分B类限值重新测试。产品随后须通过SDoC（如产品包含Wi-Fi、Zigbee或Z-Wave等有意辐射体模块，则需FCC认证）获得授权。主要实际差距：（1）中国变频热泵通常在50Hz下运行，中国发射限值针对50Hz工作条件校准——美国产品在60Hz下运行，谐波发射特征不同；（2）Wi-Fi或智能家居模块须作为有意辐射体单独取得FCC认证；（3）FCC标签和SDoC声明须以英文显示在产品上或随附文件中。FCC认可实验室不接受中国EMC测试报告作为等同依据。
gap.zht: 配有變頻驅動器或智能控制系統的中國ASHP產品，須由FCC認可實驗室（NVLAP或A2LA認可）按FCC第15部分B類限值重新測試。產品隨後須通過SDoC（如產品包含Wi-Fi、Zigbee或Z-Wave等有意輻射體模塊，則需FCC認證）獲得授權。主要實際差距：（1）中國變頻熱泵通常在50Hz下運行，中國發射限值針對50Hz工作條件校準——美國產品在60Hz下運行，諧波發射特徵不同；（2）Wi-Fi或智能家居模塊須作為有意輻射體單獨取得FCC認證；（3）FCC標籤和SDoC聲明須以英文顯示在產品上或隨附文件中。FCC認可實驗室不接受中國EMC測試報告作為等同依據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — FCC Part 15 authorisation required for all electronic equipment marketed in the US; equipment without FCC authorisation may be detained at US customs
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 4343.1 / GB/T 9254 compliance required under SAMR framework; CCC includes EMC for certain product categories

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] FCC Part 15 authorisation is mandatory for all electronic heat pump equipment marketed in the US. Chinese GB/T 9254 / GB 4343 test reports are not accepted. Products must be re-tested at 60 Hz operating conditions by an FCC-accredited laboratory. Inverter-driven heat pumps with smart home modules require additional FCC certification for the intentional radiator components.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] FCC第15部分授权对在美国销售的所有电子热泵设备为强制要求。中国GB/T 9254 / GB 4343测试报告不被接受。产品须由FCC认可实验室在60Hz工作条件下重新测试。带智能家居模块的变频热泵，其有意辐射体组件需额外取得FCC认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] FCC第15部分授權對在美國銷售的所有電子熱泵設備為強制要求。中國GB/T 9254 / GB 4343測試報告不被接受。產品須由FCC認可實驗室在60Hz工作條件下重新測試。帶智能家居模塊的變頻熱泵，其有意輻射體組件需額外取得FCC認證。
